name: Jordan
profile_summary: A digital artist who finds beauty in technical constraints. Jordan enjoys quiet environments and deep, one-on-one conversations about the future of design.

name: Casey
profile_summary: A dedicated marathon runner and biohacker. Casey values physical optimization, early mornings, and people who have the drive to push their limits.

name: Alex
profile_summary: An antique restorer with a passion for jazz history. Alex appreciates craftsmanship, slow living, and the stories behind old objects.

name: Sam
profile_summary: A street artist and skater deeply embedded in urban culture. Sam lives for the moment, values authenticity, and dislikes rigid corporate structures.

name: Taylor
profile_summary: A sustainability advocate who finds peace in gardening and baking. Taylor seeks a partner who values family, nature, and a stable, cozy home life.

name: Morgan
profile_summary: A stock trader and chess enthusiast. Morgan views life as a series of strategic moves and respects intelligence, ambition, and efficiency.

name: Riley
profile_summary: A scuba diver and travel photographer. Riley is at home in the ocean and seeks someone to explore the world with, valuing quiet confidence over loud talk.

name: Jamie
profile_summary: A dedicated cosplayer and anime fan. Jamie is deeply creative, values niche communities, and looks for someone who isn't afraid to be a bit weird.

name: Skyler
profile_summary: An outdoor survivalist and geologist. Skyler prefers mountain peaks to city streets and values resilience, silence, and practical skills.

name: Charlie
profile_summary: A stand-up comedian and podcast host. Charlie is the life of every party and values wit, social intelligence, and a good sense of humor.
